__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=World Wide Web,Gold Standard,The Nightmare,Gunfire in Pennsylvania,Khonsu Pyramidion,The Lancet
|rank=orange
|amount=6
|category=self
|description=Per 6 distinct Souls offered, Priest-Snail Assistance DMG +96; Distinct Souls Offered: 300/300
}}
[[Category:Self]]
[[Category:Priest-Snail Boost]]
[[Category:Enhanced by Distinct Souls Offered]]
